name: White Rose Golf & Training Center - Harrisburg (Formerly the Golf Garage)
about: White Rose Golf & Training Center in Harrisburg offers an indoor golf experience designed for improvement and year-round practice. Formerly known as the Golf Garage, the facility provides a controlled environment where golfers can utilize simulator technology to refine their skills. The venue focuses on delivering a dedicated training space suitable for instructional sessions and independent practice, moving away from the traditional weather-dependent limitations of the sport. The checkout integration indicates a modern, seamless booking process for visitors. The facility caters to players looking for serious training tools without the distractions often found in entertainment-focused golf centers. It provides a professional atmosphere where players of all skill levels can work on their game.
why_golfers_like_it: Online booking and secure payment system
Formerly Golf Garage with established local presence

simulator_hardware.notes: Technology specifics not listed on website

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While you are welcome to bring your own set, the training center typically provides club rentals for your convenience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, as a focused training center, outside food and non-alcoholic beverages are generally permitted to help you maintain energy during long practice sessions.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: On a simulator, an 18-hole round typically takes between 45 minutes to an hour depending on the pace of play and the software being used.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the center is family-friendly and offers a great environment for juniors to learn and practice golf in a controlled indoor setting.
